name: Artichoke, Tomato and Three Cheese Pizza (Ada)
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Roma tomatoes, seeded and chopped
1 pound pizza dough, thawed if frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. In a stainless-steel strainer, combine the chopped tomatoes and 1/2 teaspoon salt. Set aside for 30 minutes to drain excess liquid.
2. Preheat oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. In a small bowl, stir together the ricotta cheese, Asiago cheese, basil, remaining 1/4 teaspoon salt, and pepper.
4. Roll out or stretch pizza dough to fit a 12-inch round pizza pan. Drizzle with 1 teaspoon basil oil and spread evenly with the ricotta mixture.
5. Scatter half of the tomatoes and mozzarella over the ricotta. Arrange the artichoke hearts on the pizza and scatter with the remaining tomatoes and mozzarella.
6. Drizzle with the remaining tablespoon basil olive oil.
7. Bake pizza for 15 minutes. Sprinkle with the remaining Asiago cheese and return to oven for 5-10 minutes until crust is golden brown and cheeses are melted.
Recipe From: cheesebytes@ilovecheese.com
Prep time: 30 minutes
Cook time: 20-25 minutes
